# Plan: Simplicity-First

## Overview
Minimal viable approach focusing on the core problem only.

## Architecture
- Single module with clear interfaces
- No unnecessary abstractions

## Implementation Steps
1. Define core types
2. Implement main function
3. Add error handling
4. Test critical paths

## Risks
- May need refactoring for scale
- Limited extensibility

## Timeline
Phase 1: 1 week (everything)
